results.title: Woman of Chamula : Indian family
results.brief_description: SUMMARY: Shows the life of a Mexican Indian family in Chiapas where the Indians live in much the same way as their Mayan ancestors a thousand years ago. Describes the mother of the family and her activities in the home

results.title: This matter of motivation
results.brief_description: SUMMARY: A series of seven films on motivation based on original material developed by the Caterpillar Tractor Company from the concepts of Frederick Herzberg. Teaches the effectiveness of behavioural science motivation techniques. Covers specific personnel problems by means of case studies.;”CONTENTS: 1. The basic instructional film. 28 min. - 2. The puzzle. 6 min. - 3. The roadblock. 6 min. - 4. The gilded lilly. 5 min. - 5. The pacesetter. 6 min. - 6. The nice guy. 4 min. - 7. The ball of fire. 4 min.”

results.title: Sugar and spice
results.brief_description: SUMMARY: Shows sex-role socialization in children’s play in several day-care centre in New York City. Describes some of the efforts of teachers and parents of children in the elementary grades to encourage nonsexist socialization
